2026-04-09JUSCompetition Tribunal ActAppointment of a member of the Competition TribunalAppointment of the Honourable Phuong Thuy Van Ngo of Ottawa, Ontario, a Judge of the Federal Court, to be a member of the Competition Tribunal, to hold office for a term of seven years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a member of the Competition Tribunal
precis: Appointment of the Honourable Phuong Thuy Van Ngo of Ottawa, Ontario, a Judge of the Federal Court, to be a member of the Competition Tribunal, to hold office for a term of seven years.
